self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Wildling Nightstar: every 10s the wielder gains 24/30/36/42/48% (R1/R3/R5) of their own Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK for 12s. Auto-applied from the wielder's own live EM, selected by the leaderboard's chosen refinement for this weapon (main-weapon-pool selection).

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Wildling Nightstar (support use): nearby party members gain 30% of the wielder's Wildling Nightstar buff (7.2/10.8/14.4% of the wielder's EM at R1/R3/R5) as flat ATK. Type the support wielder's actual EM into this condition's input for an exact value at the weapon's chosen refinement; the checkbox-only fallback assumes 800 EM.
